title: Daewoo Argyle Collection, 1.7L, Electric Kettle With Removable Lid and Filter For An Easy Clean, Auto Shut Off And Power Indicator For Safety, Grey
features: STYLISH DESIGN – Add a unique and eye-catching element to your kitchen with our textured zigzag kettle, enhancing the overall aesthetic to make your kitchen cosier and inviting. Shop the collection and mix and match with a range of colours

LARGE CAPACITY – The 1.7 litre capacity makes pouring a cuppa for the whole family convenient, with roughly 7 cups being filled on a full boil in under 4 minutes. Use the external water gauge to monitor how much water you have in your kettle

CONCEALED HEATING ELEMENT – Keeps our kettle boiling fast and water fresh-tasting as it’s designed to prevent limescales build-up, so performance is never compromised. Also, prevent overheating as it won’t boil without water, prolonging the lifespan

EASY TO CLEAN – The spout filter is removable and washable meaning you can keep it free of any residual particles that might impact the freshness of your water. While the concealed heating element does its part, we have made yours quick and easy

SAFETY FEATURES – The auto switch off and LED indicator are important for safety and energy efficiency. Preventing potential hazards such as over-boiling and water wastage. While LED switch indicates clearly when the kettle is in use or finished boiling
PEACE OF MIND – Enjoy a comprehensive 3-year warranty, subject to online registration, ensuring your confidence in the longevity and quality of your Daewoo Argyle collection kettle
